productDisplayName: Provogue Men Printed Navy Blue Shirt
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, front press buttoned placket, long sleeves with press buttoned cuffs and a mid sleeve press buttoned flap, navy blue and red print from the top of the shirt to the waist, branding appliquéd on the inside of the placket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm iron on reverseTrust provogue to nail the minimalistic mood of the moment with their casual wear for men. With its timeless luxe fabric, this shirt looks good styled with a simple pair of denims or under a structured blazer for a layered look.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
